name: User
fields: PhoneCode (int?, nullable — country code for 2FA SMS)
CountryId (int — same value as LanguageId, shared field)
ImpersonatingUserId (int?, nullable — set when another user is impersonating this user)
AuthenticatorSecret (string — TOTP secret, stored unencrypted — TD_005)
note: CountryId and LanguageId hold the same value (design quirk, do not change during migration)

name: UserRefreshToken
note: Extended on each use via ExtendRefreshToken(). Stored in DB table.

name: UserDto
note: Read model returned from GET /api/user. Subset of User entity fields.

name: CustomerSamlSettings
fields: EmailClaim (string — attribute name for email in SAML assertion)
scope: Per-customer — each customer can configure its own SAML IdP

name: NudgeType (enum)
note: AuthenticatorApp nudge: prompts user to set up 2FA authenticator app. Other nudges are cross-domain (messaging/eboks/voice).

name: UserNudgingBlocksDto
note: Map of NudgeType → bool (true = user has blocked nudge, false = nudge still active). Returned by GET nudging endpoint.

name: ProfileAccessModel / ProfileRoleAccessModel / UserRoleAccessModel
note: Access control read models. Used across all domains to check profile/user/role combinations.

name: ManagedIdentityAuthenticationHandler
note: Custom ASP.NET Core AuthenticationHandler for Azure Managed Identity. Used for service-to-service calls (NOT user login). Validates Azure MSI tokens on inbound service requests.

rules: Creating new ticket (GetSessionTicket) INVALIDATES all existing sessions for UserId
name: LocationAlertSession
lifecycle: Created on GetSessionTicket (with ticket) or /login (without ticket). TicketId redeemed on exchangeTicketForSessionId. DateSessionExpiresUtc renewed +8h on each IsSessionActive. Row invalidated on logout or when GetSessionTicket creates new session.
description: Session registry for LocationAlert-to-ServiceAlert SSO. One row per active LocationAlert session. TicketId is null for direct logins. SessionId used by LocationAlert as bearer token for all API calls. Session expires if DateSessionExpiresUtc passed or user logs out.
